title: selaginella pruskiana
intro: Selaginella pruskiana, also known as the Spiny Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Selaginella pruskiana is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts are also used in traditional remedies.
